meaning: n.女人,少女 Jill 吉尔(女子名)
examples: Jill washed and stitched the wound.
Jill volunteered to organize a petition.
Jill wants to travel and see life for herself.
American hostage Jill Carroll has been freed in Baghdad after being held for nearly three months.
Dr. Jill Biden is the Second Lady of the United States and a lifelong educator.
